event: ESRD on intermittent hemodialysis (IHD) for about 5 years
symptomatic bradyarrhythmia requiring permanent implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (AICD)
upper half central veins significantly stenotic or completely occluded
right femoral vein last patent for cannulation
grade 2/6 late diastolic murmur at right upper sternal border
right femoral cuffed catheter minimal erythema

trans-esophageal echocardiography confirmed tricuspid valve infectious endocarditis

antibiotics changed to ampicillin, vancomycin, and cefepime
tunneled catheter exchanged over guidewire with new catheter at same femoral site
